name: tix
description: Tix Workspace — Tiwater Agent Harness Framework (core monorepo containing the Tix Computer, Gateway, and CLI)

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @tix/gateway run build && pnpm --filter @tix/computer run build
scripts.build:watch: concurrently -n gateway,computer -c cyan,green "pnpm --filter @tix/gateway run build:watch" "pnpm --filter @tix/computer run build:watch"
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @tix/gateway run build && concurrently -n devui,computer -c cyan,green "pnpm --filter devui run dev" "sleep 1 && pnpm --filter @tix/computer run dev"
